reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending a DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot before minValidSlot (or endSlot before minValidSlot), causing the server to return success (code 0x00, implicit nil return at L74) instead of responseCodeResourceUnavailable (0x03) as required by the P2P spec. Code verification confirmed: validateDataColumnsByRange returns (nil, nil) at L198-200 when endSlot < minStartSlot, handler returns nil at L72-74 without writing error response. 01e reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json L516-532, assertion 'forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable' covering SG-008. Severity: Medium appropriate for Prysm (31% CL share) P2P spec violation affecting data availability sampling interoperability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range. Assertion: forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable
